text:
clsung      2006-09-19 07:27:52 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    lang/asn1c           Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  - Update to 0.9.21
  - original description:
    The ASN.1 compiler port lang/asn1c needs to be updated. A new
    version of compiler is available. Changes include RRC
    and H.248.1/MEGACO encoding support (PER).
  
  PR:             ports/103396
  Submitted by:   maintainer (Lev Walkin)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.11      +1 -1      ports/lang/asn1c/Makefile
  1.9       +3 -3      ports/lang/asn1c/distinfo
  1.4       +1 -1      ports/lang/asn1c/pkg-descr
  1.7       +7 -1      ports/lang/asn1c/pkg-plist
